key.name: sync-server-url
key.description: The URL of the Kaya Server to synchronize with. If set to the default (https://kaya.town), sync is disabled until a custom server is configured.

key.name: sync-email
key.description: The email address for authenticating with the Kaya Server.

key.name: sync-enabled
key.description: Whether synchronization with the Kaya Server is enabled.

key.name: sync-in-progress
key.description: Whether a synchronization operation is currently in progress.

key.name: sync-last-error
key.description: The last error that occurred during synchronization, if any.

key.name: sync-last-success
key.description: Timestamp of the last successful synchronization.

key.name: native-host-port
key.description: The port number for the local HTTP server that accepts files from the browser extension.
